description.zh: 御史台负责检查字段完整度、链接有效性、页面可展示性，以及内容是否符合礼部标准。
description.en: Yushitai checks field completeness, link health, presentability, and whether content matches Libu standards.

longDescription.zh: 在这套系统里，御史台是礼部之后的最后一道关卡。它不负责写内容，而负责挑错、拦截格式问题、提醒内容缺口，并把明显不合格的条目打回重写。
longDescription.en: In this system, Yushitai is the last gate after Libu. It does not write content. It catches mistakes, blocks broken formats, flags content gaps, and sends weak entries back for revision.

skills.zh: SEO 与页面完整性检查

achievements.zh: 把内容发布失败从“页面出错”前置成“构建时报错”，大幅降低线上事故。
achievements.en: Moved failures from broken live pages to build-time validation, greatly reducing production accidents.

configSummary.zh: 御史台配置中包含 ID 唯一性、下载文件存在性、slug 命名和多语言字段检查。
configSummary.en: Yushitai configuration includes unique IDs, download file existence, slug naming, and localized field checks.

scaleSummary.zh: 御史台的 Scale 是严格型：不满足最小字段要求就直接终止发布流程。
scaleSummary.en: Yushitai operates on a strict scale: if the minimum field contract is not met, publishing stops immediately.
